overall.description: A cinematic walk through a medieval castle garden in a video game (resembling Hogwarts Legacy), featuring cobblestone paths, manicured hedges, and NPCs in wizard robes. The camera moves from a winding garden path toward a central fountain with a large Gothic castle in the background, bathed in soft morning light with atmospheric god rays.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding cobblestone path through the castle gardens, passing wooden benches with sitting NPCs

wooden park benches with NPCs sitting on them

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cobblestone path winding through a lush castle garden. A stone wall runs along the left while manicured hedges line the right. In the distance, Gothic castle towers with red banners rise against a backdrop of misty mountains. NPCs in wizard robes walk scattered through the area, with some sitting on wooden benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: central garden plaza with fountain and castle entrance

events.description: leaving the cobblestone path and entering the grassy central plaza area
slowing approach toward two characters standing by the central fountain

agents.ego_description: turning toward the central fountain and approaching two NPCs standing in the garden plaza, with the castle entrance visible to the right

notable_agents.action: two characters in colored wizard robes standing and conversing near the fountain, one in red and one in blue

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain in the center of the garden plaza
large Gothic castle facade with pointed arches and tall windows
arched stone entrance gate to the castle building

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the cobblestone path and enters a grassy central plaza dominated by a multi-tiered stone fountain. Two NPCs in colored wizard robes stand conversing near the fountain. The massive Gothic castle building looms on the right with its arched entrance, while the camera approaches the characters and the fountain area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded garden walkway into a grand, open plaza dominated by a towering Gothic castle. It begins on a winding cobblestone path flanked by a stone wall and manicured hedges, with wizardly NPCs scattered among wooden benches and red banners fluttering from distant towers against misty mountains. As the camera advances, the narrow path gives way to a wide, grassy central plaza where the environment opens up to reveal a multi-tiered stone fountain. The scene then shifts focus toward two conversing figures in colored robes as the massive arched entrance of the castle looms larger on the right, drawing the viewer deeper into the heart of the estate.
